projectDescription: A real-time multiplayer Wordle party game where players join rooms to compete simultaneously in guessing five-letter words.
keyFeatures: Real-time multiplayer gameplay using Firebase Firestore
Multiple room modes: Solo, Versus, Party (up to 5), Mega Party (up to 10), and custom player limits
Public and private rooms with optional late-join support
Custom word lists provided by the room creator
Google OAuth authentication with persistent guest sessions via UUID cookie
Player profiles with stats (games played, wins, total points)
Progressive Web App (PWA) with mobile-first design
Animated UI powered by Framer Motion
Word validation and random word generation via Fastify backend
publicApiSurface: GET /api/valid?word={word} — Validates whether a word is an acceptable guess
DELETE /api/rooms — Clears all rooms from Firestore (admin)
Firestore collection: rooms/{id} — Room document with game state
Firestore collection: rooms/{id}/players/{uid} — Per-player game state
Firestore collection: rooms/{id}/messages — In-room chat messages
Firestore collection: users/{uid} — User profile and stats
